description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named facebook/redex/build_and_test that can be called as a workflow. It should have a default environment variable CACHE_VERSION set to xxxxx1. The workflow consists of three jobs: linux-gcc, build-deb_stable-w-clang-llvm-org, and build-windows. The linux-gcc job runs on a 4-core-ubuntu environment with a containerized Debian or Ubuntu OS, and performs steps to install prerequisites, check out the repository, prepare Debian, and set up build and test with make. The build-deb_stable-w-clang-llvm-org job runs on a 4-core-ubuntu environment with Clang and LLVM.org, and performs steps to check out the repository, prepare Debian, and set up build and test with make for different Clang versions. The build-windows job runs on a windows-latest environment and performs steps to check out the repository and set up build and test on Windows.
